title: Velvet Christmas Poinsettia 6pcs White Artificial Magnolia Flowers Picks Stems for Christmas Tree Decorations
features: Velvet Christmas Poinsettia Flowers for Christmas Tree Decorations are embellished with velvet petals and Champagne glittered edges.
White Christmas poinsettia ornaments are dramatic decorations for Christmas trees, party, wedding, banquet, etc.
Artificial Christmas Magnolia with stem. Easy to place them securely in between Christmas tree branches.
Easy to re-arrange these Christmas poinsettia petals as you want with an flexible iron wire on the reverse side.
Pack of 6 Velvet Christmas Poinsettia measures 22.5cm in diameter. Stem length:20cm
description: Christmas Poinsettia Flowers for Christmas Decorations are embellished with sparkling glittered petals and glittered Stamen in the center.
